panels.description: Wide shot: Morning light on an arctic sea. Sailors lean over the railing of a ship, looking down at a desolate fragment of ice holding a small, mysterious sledge. I stand slightly behind them, observing with curiosity.

bubbles.text: As soon as it was light, I found the sailors clustered at the rail, staring at something adrift in the ice.

panels.description: Medium close-up: A gaunt, hollow-eyed stranger stands on the ice fragment, his cloak tattered by the wind. He looks up toward the deck with an urgent, desperate expression.

bubbles.text: Before I come on board, will you tell me whither you are bound?

panels.description: Medium close-up: The Master of the ship, looking shocked, stares down at the stranger. The backdrop is the icy horizon under a pale, cold sky.

bubbles.text: We are on a voyage of discovery towards the northern pole.

panels.description: Close-up: The stranger being hauled onto the deck by sailors. His face is pale, limbs nearly frozen, features emaciated by immense suffering. My hand reaches out to help him, expressing deep sympathy.

bubbles.text: Good God! Margaret, if you had seen this man, your surprise would have been boundless.
